text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On my day off, I head toward the shopping
district and see a crowd gathering around...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: My name's Haru Urara! Please take one!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! I'm handing out flyers!

text_block_list.name: Energetic Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: Hello! Here's one for you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I look at the flyer that's been handed to me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "Vote Haru Urara for the Arima Kinen!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...Is written on it.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Arima Kinen participants are decided through a
vote, right?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
So, my fan club said we should try and gather
votes from other fans!

text_block_list.name: Energetic Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: It'd be really hard for Urara to qualify on her own.

text_block_list.name: Energetic Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
So we figured we should do something to help
her!

text_block_list.name: Energetic Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
She's always bringing joy into our lives, so we
wanna help her achieve her dream!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Heehee, thanks, everyone! I'm definitely going to
enter!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Haru Urara's fan club wanted to help her
in some way, and this is what they came up with.
What a remarkable gesture.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although I'm not sure Haru Urara fully
understands just how much they're doing for her.

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Wow, Haru Urara is going for the Arima Kinen?
Oh my!

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, we'll vote for you! I'll tell my friends
too!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Really? Thank you! I need all the votes I can get!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara is quite popular. In fact, I'm sure she'll
get enough votes to enter the Arima Kinen like
this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: However...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Let's give it our best, Trainer! I'm so excited!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: ...What the heck is this?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: How can I smile right now?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the Umamusume that competed against Haru
Urara in the February Stakes. She looks at the
flyer distastefully.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hey, long time no see! I'm passing out flyers!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I can see that... For the Arima Kinen, right?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: That's right! I wasn't on track to make it in, so...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Everyone is helping me get votes!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
...Hey, Urara. Do you even know what you're
doing right now?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh? Um, I'm asking people to vote for me...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: That way I can enter the Arima Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: What the heck is wrong with you?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: H-huh?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
This is the Arima Kinen we're talking about...
Everyone wants in, but only those who work hard
are going to get it. That's why we're all training
our butts off.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
But here you are taking the easy way out—using
the voting rule to bribe your way in.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
You're making a mockery of all of us who are
serious about running in this race!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to compete against someone who's
just doing this for fun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara stares silently as the Umamusume
storms off.

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text: ...When you think about it, she does have a point.

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
I do want Urara to run in the Arima Kinen, but it
should be based on her abilities as a racer.

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. The Arima Kinen is a really big race after
all. But I still want to see Urara run in it...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Everyone...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
She seemed angry at me. I don't know what to
do...

text_block_list.name: Energetic Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: ... Sorry, Urara. It's our fault.

text_block_list.name: Energetic Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
This was our idea, and it caused a fight between
you and your friend.

text_block_list.name: Energetic Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: We're really sorry!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Why are you apologizing? You guys didn't do
anything wrong!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I-I just don't understand any of this...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: But I messed up, I know that much.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The once cheerful atmosphere goes sour, and the
fan club decides to stop handing out the flyers.
After calling it a day, I take Haru Urara back to
the dorms.
